plan.description: Snapshot-only example: equity spot prices in initial_market.prices and a quarterly dividend schedule for AAPL in initial_market.dividends, with no calibration steps. Demonstrates Track B for equities — non-bootstrapped equity marks (spot prices and dividend schedules) loaded directly as MarketScalar and DividendSchedule values. This is a standalone variant of the initial_market block from 08_equity_vol_surface.json, presented without the vol_surface calibration step to isolate the Track B equity snapshot pattern. Spot prices use the MarketScalar::Price(Money) shape. The AAPL dividend schedule uses four quarterly cash dividends of $0.25 each, matching standard US large-cap quarterly payout conventions.
